messages.content: Hey everyone! Hope you’re all having a chill day 😊 Anyone got any fun weekend plans?
Hey Charlie! Not much planned yet, might go for a hike if the weather's good. Anyone up for some board games Saturday night? 😁
Ooo board games sound fun! I’m in! Also, if it’s nice out, maybe we could do something outside before? Like a little picnic or something? 🧺
I just found out that penguins have knees!
Picnic and board games? That sounds like the best day ever! Count me in for both 😄 I can bring snacks or drinks—just let me know what we need!
I’m totally down for a picnic and board games! 🎲 I can bring some homemade cookies or chips if that works. Let me know if we need anything else. This is shaping up to be an awesome Saturday!
Yesss, love this energy! I can bring some fruit or maybe a big salad for the picnic. Also, what games are we thinking? I still haven’t beaten anyone at Codenames yet, just saying 😏

Love all these picnic vibes! I can bring drinks—maybe some iced tea and lemonade? As for games, Codenames is great but I’m also down for some classics like Uno or Settlers if anyone’s feeling competitive 😄

Sounds like we’re gonna have a feast AND a showdown 😂 I’ll dust off my Uno skills, but Codenames rematch is a must, Eve! I can bring my set of Cards Against Humanity too, just in case we want some laughs later. Where should we meet up for the picnic?

Omg this is going to be so much fun! I’m happy to bring some sandwiches or wraps for the picnic. As for where to meet—what about the park by the river? There’s lots of shade and picnic tables. And Jack, Cards Against Humanity is always a good time 😂
The park by the river sounds perfect! Plenty of space and good vibes. I’ll make sure to bring enough cups for drinks too. Should we aim for noon-ish to grab a good spot?
Noon works for me! I’ll pack a big blanket just in case the tables are taken. Can’t wait for all the food and games—and Diana, your wraps are legendary 😋 Let’s hope the weather holds!

Noon at the river park sounds perfect to me! Thanks for bringing the wraps, Diana, and Iris, your blanket always comes in clutch 😂 I’ll try to get there a bit early in case we need to snag a spot. Fingers crossed for sunshine! 🌞

Awesome, this is shaping up to be a legendary hangout 😄 I’ll bring a speaker for some background tunes and maybe a frisbee if anyone’s up for a little action before we settle into the food and games. Can’t wait to see everyone!

Yesss, love the picnic essentials lineup! Thanks Henry, a little music and frisbee sounds perfect. I’ll check the weather again the day before and let everyone know just in case anything changes, but so far it looks sunny! Super excited to see everyone and eat allll the snacks 😄

Love it, Diana! Appreciate you being on weather duty 😂 Henry, your speaker is a game-changer—can we start a playlist? Everyone, toss your song recs in here! I’ll add my usual weird indie picks, fair warning.

Haha, Jack’s indie picks always spice up the vibe! I’ll throw in some old-school jams and maybe a couple of guilty pleasures too (no judgment, right? 😅). Can’t wait to see what everyone adds—this playlist is gonna be a whole journey!

No judgment at all, Diana—guilty pleasures make the best playlists 😂 I’ll add some throwback hits and a couple of summer tunes. Maybe we’ll even get a group singalong if the energy’s right! This is gonna be awesome.

I’m here for the singalong vibes 😂 I’ll toss in a few classics and maybe some questionable 2000s bangers—no regrets! Also, does anyone have a cooler we can borrow for drinks? I can pick up ice on the way.

I’ve got a cooler I can bring! It’s not huge but should fit a good amount of drinks and snacks. Bob, if you’re grabbing ice, that’s perfect. Also, fully support all questionable song choices—can’t wait to see this playlist, lol.

Nice, Charlie! That should do the trick. Thanks for bringing the cooler and thanks Bob for the ice run 🙌 I’ll start the playlist and drop the link here so everyone can add their songs. Gonna be some epic tunes and snack combos, I can feel it already!

This is coming together so perfectly! I’ll dig up some feel-good road trip songs to add to the playlist—no promises they aren’t cheesy 😂 Let me know if we need extra cups or napkins, I’ve got a stash at home I can bring. So excited for this!

Grace, extra cups and napkins would be awesome, thank you! I’ll bring my big picnic blanket (the one with the weird pineapples 😂) and maybe some card games too in case we want a chill break between snacks and frisbee. This is gonna be the best day!

Iris, the pineapple blanket is iconic 😂 Card games are a great call too—love it. Grace, cheesy road trip songs are a must, bring ’em on! I think between all of us we’ve got everything covered. Just need to figure out what time we’re meeting and we’re golden!

Love how organized we’re getting, honestly 😂 I vote for a late morning start—maybe 11ish? Gives everyone time to sleep in a bit and still have plenty of sunshine for snacks, games, and questionable singalongs. What do you all think?
11 sounds perfect to me! Gives me just enough time for coffee and maybe not burn the breakfast bagels I promised to bring 😅 An

needle_message: I just found out that penguins have knees!
